summary: Iteration 137: Tested ManoProtect AppCliente Trial, Anti-Abuse & Subscription System. All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests confirmed auth screen, registration, login, dashboard, profile, referral system, and navigation all working correctly.

issues: Cookie consent banner covers bottom of screen - can be dismissed

seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing with unique UUIDs for identification
context_for_next_testing_agent: AppCliente at /app-cliente is fully functional. Client trial APIs are at /api/client-trial/*. Registration creates 7-day trial. Referral system adds +3 days to both users. Stripe checkout creates Stripe-hosted checkout page. Anti-abuse scoring checks IP and fingerprint reuse.

backend_tests: POST /api/client-trial/register - creates user with 7-day trial - PASSED
POST /api/client-trial/login - valid credentials returns token and trial status - PASSED
POST /api/client-trial/login - with fingerprint stores device - PASSED
GET /api/client-trial/status - authenticated returns subscription status - PASSED
POST /api/client-trial/checkout - creates Stripe checkout session with URL - PASSED
POST /api/client-trial/referral/apply - valid code gives +3 days - PASSED
POST /api/client-trial/check-abuse - new fingerprint returns low score - PASSED
frontend_tests: Registration form with name field visible - PASSED
Registration creates user and redirects to dashboard - PASSED
Dashboard shows trial badge with days remaining - PASSED
Quick action buttons (Armar Total, Armar Parcial, Desarmar, SOS) visible - PASSED
Navigation tabs (Inicio, Camaras, Eventos, Perfil) work - PASSED
Profile shows user info and trial status - PASSED
Referral code displayed in profile - PASSED
Referral input and apply button work - PASSED
Referral bonus (+3 days) applied successfully - PASSED
Upgrade to Premium button visible - PASSED
Login error handling shows correct message - PASSED

features_verified: Applies referral code for +3 days to both users
Returns abuse score based on IP and fingerprint
Dashboard with security status and quick actions
Profile with referral code display and apply
